{{Quote|''Do not fire'', repeat ''do not fire''! We request asylum! We are the transport ''Bail Organa'' from the planet Alderaan!|Captain of the ''Bail Organa''|<ref name="Imperial Spy">{{Kids1997Cite|issue1=11|issue2=15|story=Imperial Spy}}</ref>}}
The '''''Bail Organa''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]. The ship was used to transport refugees from the destroyed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

{{Ship-stub}}
